languages.text: "Недостаточно энергии для запуска лифта. Надо еще что-то отключить".
"Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."
languages.original_text: "Недостаточно энергии для запуска лифта. Надо еще что-то отключить".

traits.locale_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."
"Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."
"Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."
"Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

languages.text: “电力不足，无法启动电梯。得把什么东西的电给断掉。”
languages.original_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

traits.locale_text: “电力不足，无法启动电梯。得把什么东西的电给断掉。”

languages.text: "Asansörü çalıştırmak için yeterli güç yok. Başka bir şeyin gücünü kesmemiz gerek."
languages.original_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

traits.locale_text: "Asansörü çalıştırmak için yeterli güç yok. Başka bir şeyin gücünü kesmemiz gerek."

languages.text: « On n'a pas assez d'électricité pour démarrer l'ascenseur. Il va falloir couper le courant quelque part. »
languages.original_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

traits.locale_text: « On n'a pas assez d'électricité pour démarrer l'ascenseur. Il va falloir couper le courant quelque part. »

languages.text: «Nos falta energía para activar el ascensor. Tendremos que cortar el suministro de otro mecanismo».
languages.original_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

traits.locale_text: «Nos falta energía para activar el ascensor. Tendremos que cortar el suministro de otro mecanismo».

languages.text: "Nicht genug Energie, um den Aufzug zu starten. Wir müssen etwas anderes vom Netz nehmen."
languages.original_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht genug Energie, um den Aufzug zu starten. Wir müssen etwas anderes vom Netz nehmen."

languages.text: 「昇降機を起動するには電力が足りない。ほかの何かへの電力を切らねば」
languages.original_text: "Not enough power to start the lift. We need to cut power to something else."

traits.locale_text: 「昇降機を起動するには電力が足りない。ほかの何かへの電力を切らねば」
